Some tips for SEO:

- Gently optimize your title tags.
- Also add meta descriptions to your pages.
- You should basically create good content.
- Remember to update your website regularly for better results.

Here are a few more things to consider:

1. Carefully plan your keyword strategy before doing anything else because it matters.
2. Creating backlinks is a lot of work but is necessary because it helps ranking and if you don't do it then you'll fall behind and your competitors will outrank you and steal your traffic and customers.
3. Making sure your website loads fast.
4. Adding internal links.

SEO is really a long-term investment. It takes time to see results. But if you stick with it, you'll definitely see improvements. In conclusion, SEO is an essential part of any digital marketing strategy that businesses should leverage to tap into new audiences and drive sustainable growth.
